chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1422 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Petitioner Asghar Ali Shar present in person Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Through this Petition, the Petitioner is seeking directions against the respondents for initiating inquiry and conducting a transparent audit in respect of the utilization of the funds allocated to Union Council, Abad Laka, Sukkur. On query of the Court, the Petitioner present in Court submits that he has not approached the higher Authorities for redressal of his grievances and has directly approached this Court. Since the alternate remedy is available to the Petitioner to approach Respondent No.2 / Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh in the first instance, which he has not availed and has directly preferred this Petition, which is not maintainable, hence the petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the concerned authorities for the redressal of his grievances, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
